message:
fix(cache): Use saturating_mul to prevent overflow in age calculation

Replace `max_cache_age_hours * 60` with `saturating_mul(60)` to prevent
integer overflow when computing max_age_minutes. While unlikely in practice
(would require ~35 million hours), this follows defensive programming
principles and silences potential overflow warnings from static analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
